intake.event_framing: Assess a large ad-tech platform response to an escalating enforcement case.
intake.current_development: A competition regulator escalates an ad-tech case and signals possible structural remedies.
known_constraints: The company must protect major revenue lines
known_unknowns: Whether internal documents materially worsen the case

summary: A negotiated remedy is preferable to protracted litigation

documents.adtech-remedies.md: Regulators signal willingness to seek structural remedies while industry partners brace for disruption.
documents.adtech-remediation.md: The ad-tech platform expands internal remediation and coordinates with external counsel as enforcement momentum builds.
